content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 10, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 10, 2026, focused heavily on cloud infrastructure and AI provider integration. Key achievements include the addition of Atlas Cloud for image generation, significant refactoring of the Hetzner data-plane architecture to improve deployment consistency, and critical fixes for cloud-init resilience.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud AI Provider Integration**
*   Integrated Atlas Cloud as an image provider to resolve 500 errors caused by the lack of image models in BitRouter ([#8380](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8380)).
*   Updated Atlas Cloud models to support `images[]` arrays for edit/image-to-image tasks and normalized size formatting to `WIDTH*HEIGHT` ([#8383](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8383)).

**Infrastructure & Data-Plane Refactoring**
*   Restructured `apps-data-plane` into `apps-shared` and per-env workers to better manage shared Postgres resources ([#8386](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8386)).
*   Standardized Hetzner project usage and consolidated environment variables to `HCLOUD_TOKEN` to prevent configuration conflicts ([#8376](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8376), [#8375](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8375)).
*   Updated default tenant database server types to `cpx41` and removed the optional provisioning toggle to ensure consistent deployment ([#8379](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8379), [#8378](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8378)).

**Cloud-Init & Deployment Resilience**
*   Implemented systemd oneshot services for tenant-DB setup to ensure idempotent, boot-resilient configurations ([#8384](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8384), [#8385](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8385)).
*   Configured Nginx vhosts, self-signed certificates, and Cloudflare proxying for control-plane VMs ([#8374](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8374)).
*   Fixed staging routing issues by correctly setting `AGENT_ROUTER_ORIGIN_HOST` ([#8361](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8361)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8381](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8381): Registry update to list the third-party `@thecolony/elizaos-plugin`.
*   [#8369](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8369): Dependency updates for the `dev-dependencies` group.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   No issues were closed on this date.

## NEW ISSUES

**Android Build & Deployment**
*   [#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387): Clean-tree builds are producing web-less APKs, resulting in missing assets and connection errors on devices.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   There are no active issues with more than 3 comments.
